droids.name: R2-D2
droids.description: Astromech droid and hero of the Rebellion.

droids.name: C-3PO
droids.description: Protocol droid fluent in over six million forms of communication.

droids.name: BB-8
droids.description: Spherical astromech droid who served Poe Dameron and Rey.

droids.name: K-2SO
droids.description: Reprogrammed Imperial security droid who aided the Rebel Alliance.

droids.name: IG-88
droids.description: Assassin droid and bounty hunter in the galaxy.

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.description: A legendary Jedi Knight who fought in the Galactic Civil War.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.description: Once a heroic Jedi Knight, he was seduced by the dark side of the Force.

characters.name: Leia Organa
characters.description: Princess of Alderaan, leader of the Rebel Alliance.

characters.name: Han Solo
characters.description: Smuggler, scoundrel, and hero of the Rebellion.

characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.description: Jedi Master and mentor to Luke Skywalker.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.description: Legendary Jedi Master, wise and powerful.

characters.name: Emperor Palpatine
characters.description: Dark Lord of the Sith and Emperor of the Galactic Empire.

characters.name: Chewbacca
characters.description: Wookiee warrior and loyal friend to Han Solo.

characters.name: R2-D2
characters.description: Astromech droid and hero of the Rebellion.

characters.name: C-3PO
characters.description: Protocol droid fluent in over six million forms of communication.

planets.name: Tatooine
planets.description: A desert planet and the childhood home of Luke Skywalker.

planets.name: Alderaan
planets.description: A peaceful planet destroyed by the Death Star.

planets.name: Hoth
planets.description: An icy planet and site of a Rebel base.

planets.name: Endor
planets.description: Forest moon, home to the Ewoks.

planets.name: Naboo
planets.description: Lush planet, home to Padmé Amidala and Emperor Palpatine.

planets.name: Dagobah
planets.description: Swampy planet where Yoda lived in exile.

planets.name: Mustafar
planets.description: Volcanic planet, site of Anakin and Obi-Wan's duel.

planets.name: Jakku
planets.description: Desert planet where Rey grew up.

planets.name: Kamino
planets.description: Ocean planet, home of the cloners.

starships.name: Millennium Falcon
starships.description: A legendary starship piloted by Han Solo and Chewbacca.

starships.name: TIE Fighter
starships.description: Imperial starfighter with twin ion engines.

starships.name: Imperial Shuttle
starships.description: Transport shuttle used by the Empire.

starships.name: B-wing
starships.description: Heavy assault starfighter of the Rebellion.

starships.name: Y-wing
starships.description: Bomber used by the Rebel Alliance.

creatures.name: Bantha
creatures.description: Large, furry herbivores native to Tatooine.

creatures.name: Tauntaun
creatures.description: Reptilian creatures used by the Rebels on Hoth.

creatures.name: Rancor
creatures.description: Massive carnivorous reptile kept by Jabba the Hutt.

creatures.name: Sarlacc
creatures.description: Pit-dwelling creature in the Great Pit of Carkoon.

creatures.name: Dewback
creatures.description: Large reptilian beast used by stormtroopers on Tatooine.

creatures.name: Ewok
creatures.description: Small, furry bipeds native to Endor.

creatures.name: Nexu
creatures.description: Agile predator from the planet Cholganna.
